prerequisites: A Pennylane account on the Essential plan or higher.
Admin access to the company workspace (available to Executive, Internal Accountant, or External Accountant roles) so you can generate an API token.
A Company API token generated from the Pennylane app, supplied as the connector's api_key field.
A start_time value defining the earliest point from which to replicate data.

authMethods.name: Company API token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single Pennylane Company API token, mapped to the api_key secret field. The token is sent in the Authorization header as 'Bearer <token>'. Generate it in the Pennylane app under Management > Settings > Connectivity > Developers, choosing Read only or Read and write permissions and an expiration period; copy it immediately because it is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Company API token
setupSteps.body: Log in to Pennylane and go to Management > Settings > Connectivity > Developers. Click Generate an API Token, enter a descriptive name, select permissions (Read only is sufficient for a source connector), choose an expiration period, and generate the token. Copy the token immediately, since it is displayed only once and is not stored by Pennylane.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token as api_key
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated Company API token into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' against the Pennylane Company API base URL https://app.pennylane.com/api/external/v2/.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication start_time
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_time field to the earliest date from which the connector should begin replicating records. Data on or after this point is retrieved on the initial sync.

setupSteps.title: Verify the credentials
setupSteps.body: Confirm the token is valid by ensuring the connector can authenticate. You can independently test the same token against the /me endpoint: curl https://app.pennylane.com/api/external/v2/me -H "Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_COMPANY_API_TOKEN>".
